name: Mcp Health
description: Validate configured MCP servers for connectivity, auth, and tool/schema health before you depend on them in daily workflows. Best on any Python 3 environment with network access to your MCP targets.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: MCP Health
pt-BR.description: Valida servidores MCP configurados quanto a conectividade, autenticação e saúde de ferramentas/schema antes de usá-los no fluxo diário. Ideal em qualquer ambiente com Python 3 e acesso de rede aos alvos MCP.
